note: GitHub-clean code-only artifact subset. Oversized profiler traces, model checkpoints, raw medical scans, WandB logs, report files, and non-code submission materials are omitted. Active checksums are repository-root relative so `shasum -a 256 -c artifacts/frozen/checksums.sha256` works from the repository root. Benchmark row dataset labels match the manifest source `verse`. A static WandB API export snapshot and generated PDF summary are included under wandb_export/ because the source project is not publicly viewable without authentication. Submission-level provenance is pinned by the pushed annotated git tag `submission-final`; per-row git_sha fields remain historical run metadata. ARTIFACT_INDEX.json and checksums.sha256 are verification metadata and are not self-indexed.
